data.name: Dolly's Breeding Party
data.detailed_description:
Dolly has a husband.

A sweet, useless husband who loves her very much and cannot, for the life of him, give her what she actually wants: a baby.

She's tried patience. She's tried timing. She's tried not thinking about it, which lasted about a week. And now she's done trying the right way.

What follows is a shameless story about a woman who takes matters into her own hands – specifically into the hands of five very different men who happen to walk through her door at exactly the wrong moment. Or the right one, depending on how you look at it.

🥛 The Milkman, who came for the delivery and stayed considerably longer than his route required.

💪 The Coach, whose approach to personal training turned out to be very personal indeed.

🏠 The Neighbor, who came to borrow sugar and left with considerably more than that.

🔧 The Handyman, who had a remarkable talent for fixing one thing and breaking another.

🎭 The Mystery Guest – the one she wasn't supposed to meet, who turned out to be the hardest to forget.

Dolly's Breeding Party is a short, punchy visual novel built around infidelity, breeding kink, and the specific thrill of doing something you absolutely shouldn't. Risky timing, dirty talk, that primal pull toward being claimed. It doesn't ask permission and it doesn't apologize. Neither does Dolly.

You're not just watching – you play Dolly. You hear what's running through her head while she's smiling at her husband over breakfast. You decide who she lets in, how far she lets them go, and which version of herself walks back into her own kitchen afterward. Your choices shape who she ends up wanting, who she ends up taking, and who finally gets an invitation to the party waiting at the end of all this.

  • A choice-driven story with multiple endings, where the choices actually do something

  • Five chapters, five men, five very specific kinds of trouble

  • 3D-rendered scenes and animation

  • Full voice acting (and yes, you can turn it off – some people prefer the voice in their own head, no hard feelings)

  • Erotic tension, dry humor, and the occasional pang of something more complicated

About Two-Lick Bakery

A married couple making the adult games we kept looking for and not finding. She writes and renders, he codes and runs the tech, and together we come up with the worst things Dolly could possibly do next. Dolly's Breeding Party is our debut.

data.short_description: Play Dolly: a housewife with a loving husband, a very specific itch he can't scratch, and five men lined up to help. Infidelity, breeding kink, and the thrill of doing exactly what you shouldn't. Choice-driven adult visual novel.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: 1.8 GHz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX compatible
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11
  • 處理器: 2.5 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: dedicated GPU
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
